description_long: This is a modern recreational speedboat mounted on a dual-axle trailer, designed for transport and launching. The boat features a sleek, streamlined hull with a pronounced V-shape, ideal for cutting through water at high speeds. It has a dark blue bimini top providing shade over the cockpit area, which contains multiple seats and a central control console. The hull is primarily white with metallic and black accents, and the trailer is constructed from metal with visible wheels and a hitch for towing. The interior appears to have molded seating and storage compartments, with stainless steel railings and fixtures. The overall design suggests a vessel intended for leisure activities such as cruising, water sports, or fishing.
description: A sleek white speedboat with a blue bimini top, mounted on a metal trailer with dual axles and a towing hitch. The boat features a V-shaped hull, multiple seats, and a central control console.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed bow, trailer hitch, and the blue bimini top covering the cockpit.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the boat, the dual-axle trailer, and the streamlined hull profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stern, seating arrangement, and the back of the bimini top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the trailer wheels, hull contours, and the overall length of the boat and trailer.
